title: Configure Amazon S3 Delivery
description: Export squid run results directly to an AWS S3 bucket

content.introduction:
Configure Amazon S3 delivery to export run results directly to an AWS S3 bucket. Results will be automatically uploaded to your specified bucket and path when runs complete.

## Authentication Options

You can authenticate with S3 in two ways:

1. **AWS Credentials**: Provide `aws_access_key` and `aws_secret_key` in the request
2. **Bucket Policy**: If you don't provide credentials, ensure your bucket policy allows public WRITE permissions

parameters.name: s3_fields.bucket
parameters.description: Name of the S3 bucket where data will be stored

parameters.name: s3_fields.is_active
parameters.description: Set to true to enable S3 delivery, false to disable

parameters.name: s3_fields.target_path
parameters.description: Folder path inside the bucket where results will be saved

parameters.name: s3_fields.aws_access_key
parameters.description: (Optional) AWS Access Key for authentication. If not provided, bucket must have public WRITE permissions

parameters.name: s3_fields.aws_secret_key
parameters.description: (Optional) AWS Secret Key for authentication. If not provided, bucket must have public WRITE permissions

parameters.name: squid
parameters.description: The unique identifier (hash) of the squid for which to configure S3 delivery

proTips.content: If you don't provide AWS credentials, your bucket policy MUST allow public WRITE permissions for Lobstr to upload files.
For better security, provide AWS credentials instead of making your bucket publicly writable. Use IAM users with limited permissions.
The target_path creates a folder structure in your bucket. Results will be uploaded to s3://bucket/target_path/filename.csv
Use the Test S3 endpoint to verify your bucket permissions and credentials before activating automatic delivery.
AWS credentials are stored and returned in API responses. Ensure you're using HTTPS and handle responses securely.

seo.title: Configure Amazon S3 Delivery - lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to export squid results directly to AWS S3 buckets using the lobstr.io API. Configure bucket credentials and target paths.
